ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the applicant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Social security number of the applicant */,
  "income" TEXT /* Annual income of the applicant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the applicant (e.g., employed, self-employed, unemployed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., debt consolidation, credit card refinancing) */,
  "amount_requested" TEXT /* Amount requested by the applicant */,
  "amount_funded" TEXT /* Amount funded by investors */,
  "interest_rate" TEXT /* Interest rate offered to the applicant */,
  "loan_length" TEXT /* Length of the loan (e.g., 36 months, 60 months) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the loan application was submitted */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., fixed-rate, variable-rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_reports" (
  "credit_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit report */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "fico_range" TEXT /* FICO score range of the applicant */,
  "debt_to_income_ratio" TEXT /* Debt-to-income ratio of the applicant */,
  "open_credit_lines" INTEGER /* Number of open credit lines of the applicant */,
  "revolving_credit_balance" TEXT /* Revolving credit balance of the applicant */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Actual credit score of the applicant */,
  "credit_report_date" TEXT /* Date the credit report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_reports_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_history" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "employer" TEXT /* Employer of the applicant */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the applicant */,
  "employment_length" TEXT /* Length of employment (e.g., < 1 year, 2 years) */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., employed, unemployed, self-employed) */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the job */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employment ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan officer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the loan officer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the loan officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the loan officer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the loan officer */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the loan officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the loan officer (e.g., underwriting, origination) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan status update */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer who updated the status */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_status_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_status_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., applicant, loan officer, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user account */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date the user logged in */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date the user logged out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("account_id")
)
